summary: 2023 Significant Events - Redemption of ProFrac LLC Units for additional information. The payment obligations under the Tax Receivable Agreement are our obligations and not obligations of ProFrac LLC, and we expect that the payments required to be made under the Tax Receivable Agreement will be substantial.
